_provenance.source: PubMed via MCP (search_articles, total_count of each query)
_provenance.attribution: Data from PubMed (U.S. National Library of Medicine).
_provenance.note: Real live total_count values, frozen for offline reproducibility. Each field has a denominator query (all papers) and a numerator query (retracted publications). retraction_rate = retracted / total. Re-running the same 16 queries reproduces these counts (a closed pdat window drifts only as PubMed back-indexes late retractions; the frozen snapshot is the reproducible record).
_provenance.method: denominator query = '<field>[MeSH Terms]'; numerator query = 'Retracted Publication[Publication Type] AND <field>[MeSH Terms]'; both filtered to the window above.
